steps.title: Recognize the explanatory structure
steps.content: The phrase “of the fact that” introduces a reason for the speed difference. The blank must be a word that works with this phrase to show how the difference relates to the given reason.

steps.title: Find the relationship word
steps.content:
”A consequence” means a result—so “the difference is a consequence of the fact” expresses that the fact causes the difference.

The other choices don't work: repudiation denies rather than explains, objective implies a goal, and explanation reverses the causal direction.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
